channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: What is S/4HANA? SAP’s latest ERP system explained
item.description: What is S/4HANA? S/4HANA is SAP’s latest iteration of its flagship enterprise resource planning (ERP) system. The successor to SAP ECC, S/4HANA is built on an in-memory database and is designed to enable real-time data processing and analysis for businesses.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New iPhone scam tricks owners into giving phones away
item.description: New iPhone replacement scam uses pressure tactics and fake carrier calls to steal devices from buyers. Criminals claim shipping errors and demand urgent returns.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Apple and Google want your ID
item.description: Apple and Google would like to see your identification, please. With the former’s “Digital ID” launch last week, both companies now let you scan a digital version of your passport at more than 250 Transportation Security Administration checkpoints, using an iPhone or Android phone.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: The Morning Show season 5: everything we know about the Apple TV show's return
item.description: The Morning Show will return for a season five – here's everything we know about the return of Apple TV's most-watched shows.
item.dc:creator: Laura Martin, TechRadar

item.title: How to migrate to a new Windows PC
item.description: It’s great to get a new computer, but it’s not so great to realize that all your stuff is on the old one. You’re in luck, though. It’s easier than ever to transfer your data from an old PC to a new one. We’ve covered multiple ways you can do it, below.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to watch Royal Christmas Message 2025
item.description: King Charles III will deliver the traditional festive broadcast for the fourth time. Here's how to watch Royal Christmas Message 2025.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: A look at 2025 holiday celebrations across federal agencies
item.description: Holiday cheer spread across Washington and beyond. In fact, the good feels traveled as far as what is, for now, humanly possible, courtesy of NASA. The post A look at 2025 holiday celebrations across federal agencies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Amber Corrin, Federal News Network

item.title: Is the Internet's time wrong? NIST warns servers may have lapsed due to a power outage
item.description: NIST warns specific public time servers may be inaccurate after a power outage disrupted atomic clock distribution.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: What Apple has planned for its 50th anniversary year in 2026
item.description: Apple will be 50 years old on April 1, 2026. What can we expect from the company in the year ahead? This is actually the first of two important milestones for Apple; the next anniversary comes in 2027, which will mark 20 years since the introduction of the world-changing iPhone.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Pro-Russian hackers claim cyberattack on French postal service
item.description: French prosecutors say a pro-Russian hacking group has claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack on France’s national postal service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Get started with Python’s new native JIT
item.description: JITing, or “just-in-time” compilation, can make relatively slow interpreted languages much faster. Until recently, JITting was available for Python only in the form of specialized third-party libraries, like Numba, or alternate versions of the Python interpreter, like PyPy.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why Waymo went down in San Francisco
item.description: Last weekend, a gnarly power outage in San Francisco took out a number of traffic lights, which, in turn, sent a number of self-driving Waymo robotaxis into a sort of fugue state.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: A new honor for a leader who’s shaped cybersecurity policy and talent across sectors
item.description: "I do believe that it's not just a mission, it's a calling. And I would encourage every young person to take advantage of the opportunity," said Diana Burley The post A new honor for a leader who’s shaped cybersecurity policy and talent across sectors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump administration moves to overhaul how H-1B visas are granted, ending lottery system
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security is replacing its lottery system for H-1B visas with a new approach prioritizing skilled, higher-paid foreign workers.
item.dc:creator: Joey Cappelletti, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Android Sound Notifications help you catch key alerts
item.description: Discover Android's new Sound Notifications feature that alerts you to smoke alarms, doorbells, and baby cries even when wearing headphones.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Instacart ends a program where users could see different prices for the same item at the same store
item.description: Instacart is ending a program where customers saw different prices for the same product ordered at the same time from the same store.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Stop letting ‘urgent’ derail delivery. Manage interruptions proactively
item.description: As engineers and managers, we all have been interrupted by those unplanned, time-sensitive requests (or tasks) that arrive outside normal planning cadences. An “urgent” Slack, a last-minute requirement or an exec ask is enough to nuke your standard agile rituals.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Data center investments break all records
item.description: New data centers are being built around the world in connection with AI initiatives. According to a compilation by S&P Global, spending will reach a record $61 billion in 2025, with the US and Canada accounting for the vast majority.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google sues data scraping company
item.description: Google is now suing US data scraping company Serpapi for using hundreds of millions of fake search queries to bypass Google’s protection system and illegally obtain copyrighted material from search results, Reuters reports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
